data.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
data.description: Enhances user account security with 2FA, reducing the risk of unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: SMS verification, authenticator apps, backup codes.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Implements end-to-end encryption for private communications to protect user data from interception.

data.title: Automated Threat Detection
data.description: Uses machine learning algorithms to detect suspicious activities and potential threats in real-time.
data.technical_spec: Anomaly detection models, real-time alerts, behavioral analysis.

data.title: Data Anonymization
data.description: Applies data anonymization techniques to protect user privacy and confidentiality.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Encourages external security researchers to report vulnerabilities through a reward-based bug bounty program.
